title: T-071 — DEFERRED/CROSS-MODULE: Sensory schema is Technical-owned (do not BUILD in NPD)
prompt:
# T-071 — DEFERRED/CROSS-MODULE Sensory schema

Do not implement this as an NPD build task. Per 2026-05-03 PO decision, Sensory belongs under Technical. This task is retained only as a backlog guard so agents do not create standalone NPD sensory tables from older PRD text.

Required handling: route any sensory data model work to a Technical-owned task/contract; NPD may later consume Technical sensory status/read-model for approval gating if required.

pipeline_inputs.description: Deferred guard task: Sensory belongs under Technical per 2026-05-03 PO decision; do not create standalone NPD sensory tables.
pipeline_inputs.details: DO NOT IMPLEMENT the earlier NPD sensory BUILD path. Sensory is Technical-owned per _meta/decisions/2026-05-03-flow-d365-settings-technical-decisions.md. NPD may only consume/display Technical sensory status after a Technical-owned contract exists.
scope_files: No application files — task is blocked/deferred pending Technical-owned sensory contract
out_of_scope: Do not create NPD sensory_panels / sensory_attribute_scores / sensory_panelist_comments tables
Do not implement V08 sensory enforcement inside NPD
Do not build NPD sensory UI; use future Technical-owned contract/status only
dependencies: Technical-owned sensory data contract / future Technical task
acceptance_criteria: Given this task is selected for implementation, when read, then it is treated as BLOCKED/DEFERRED and no NPD application files are changed.
Given sensory scope is needed, when planning starts, then ownership is routed to Technical per _meta/decisions/2026-05-03-flow-d365-settings-technical-decisions.md.
Given NPD approval gating needs sensory input, when implemented later, then it consumes a Technical-owned read model/status rather than creating standalone NPD sensory schema.
test_strategy: No implementation tests in NPD; validate by backlog/PR review that no NPD sensory schema is created from this task.
risk_red_lines: Do not build standalone NPD sensory schema.
Do not contradict the 2026-05-03 decision that Sensory belongs under Technical.
Do not treat old D4 BUILD-path text as active.
